machine_start_gcode:
;===== machine: A1 =========================
;===== date: 20240620 =====================
; disable clog detection and init MCU
G392 S0 ; nozzle clog detect off
M9833.2
;M400
;M73 P1.717

;===== preheat =====
M1002 gcode_claim_action : 2
M1002 set_filament_type:{filament_type[initial_no_support_extruder]}
M104 S140 ; cool nozzle to 140 (safe for bed contact)
M140 S[bed_temperature_initial_layer_single] ; set bed temp

;===== startup sound =====
M17
M400 S1
M1006 S1
M1006 A0 B10 L100 C37 D10 M60 E37 F10 N60
M1006 A0 B10 L100 C41 D10 M60 E41 F10 N60
M1006 A0 B10 L100 C44 D10 M60 E44 F10 N60
M1006 A0 B10 L100 C0 D10 M60 E0 F10 N60
M1006 A43 B10 L100 C46 D10 M70 E39 F10 N80
M1006 A0 B10 L100 C0 D10 M60 E0 F10 N80
M1006 A0 B10 L100 C43 D10 M60 E39 F10 N80
M1006 A0 B10 L100 C0 D10 M60 E0 F10 N80
M1006 A0 B10 L100 C41 D10 M80 E41 F10 N80
M1006 A0 B10 L100 C44 D10 M80 E44 F10 N80
M1006 A0 B10 L100 C49 D10 M80 E49 F10 N80
M1006 A0 B10 L100 C0 D10 M80 E0 F10 N80
M1006 A44 B10 L100 C48 D10 M60 E39 F10 N80
M1006 A0 B10 L100 C0 D10 M60 E0 F10 N80
M1006 A0 B10 L100 C44 D10 M80 E39 F10 N80
M1006 A0 B10 L100 C0 D10 M60 E0 F10 N80
M1006 A43 B10 L100 C46 D10 M60 E39 F10 N80
M1006 W
M18
;===== startup sound =====

;===== safe z-home =====
; probe Z up then back down to find safe starting height
G91
G380 S2 Z40 F1200
G380 S3 Z-15 F1200
G90

;===== reset machine =====
;M290 X39 Y39 Z8
; set acceleration, calibrate tilt, lower Z motor current, restore motor currents
M204 S6000

M630 S0 P0
G91
M17 Z0.3 ; lower the z-motor current

G90
M17 X0.65 Y1.2 Z0.6 ; reset motor current to default
M960 S5 P1 ; logo lamp on
G90
M220 S100 ; reset feedrate to 100%
M221 S100 ; reset flow to 100%
M73.2   R1.0 ; reset time estimate
;M211 X0 Y0 Z0 ; turn off soft endstop to prevent protential logic problem

;===== noise reduction =====
M982.2 S1 ; cog noise reduction on

; set LCD status: homing
M1002 gcode_claim_action : 13

; home X, raise Z, center XY
G28 X
G91
G1 Z5 F1200
G90
G0 X128 F30000
G0 Y254 F3000
G91
G1 Z-5 F1200

; wait for nozzle to cool to 140
M109 S25 H140

; briefly extrude to clear nozzle, then retract
M17 E0.3
M83
G1 E10 F1200
G1 E-0.5 F30
M17 D

; low-precision Z home (allows high temp)
G28 Z P0 T140; home z with low precision,permit 300deg temperature
M104 S{nozzle_temperature_initial_layer[initial_extruder]}

; conditional: if build plate detected, run clog routine and lift
M1002 judge_flag build_plate_detect_flag
M622 S1
  G39.4
  G90
  G1 Z5 F1200
M623

;M400
;M73 P1.717

;===== prepare filament =====
M1002 gcode_claim_action : 24

; enable vibration suppression, disable soft endstops, move to park/brush position
M400
;G392 S1
M211 X0 Y0 Z0 ; disable soft endstops
M975 S1 ; vibration suppression on

G90
G1 X-28.5 F30000
G1 X-48.2 F3000

; AMS remap and filament load
M620 M ; enable AMS remap
M620 S[initial_no_support_extruder]A   ; switch material if AMS exist
    M1002 gcode_claim_action : 4
    M400
    M1002 set_filament_type:UNKNOWN
    M109 S[nozzle_temperature_initial_layer]
    M104 S250
    M400
    T[initial_no_support_extruder]
    G1 X-48.2 F3000
    M400

    ; set volumetric feedrate limit and heat to flush temp
    M620.1 E F{filament_max_volumetric_speed[initial_no_support_extruder]/2.4053*60} T{nozzle_temperature_range_high[initial_no_support_extruder]}
    M109 S250 ;set nozzle to common flush temp
    M106 P1 S0 ; part fan off
    G92 E0
    G1 E50 F200
    M400
    M1002 set_filament_type:{filament_type[initial_no_support_extruder]}
M621 S[initial_no_support_extruder]A

; slow extrude to purge old filament, cool with part fan
M109 S{nozzle_temperature_range_high[initial_no_support_extruder]} H300
G92 E0
G1 E50 F200 ; lower extrusion speed to avoid clog
M400
M106 P1 S178 ; part fan 70%
G92 E0
G1 E5 F200
M104 S{nozzle_temperature_initial_layer[initial_no_support_extruder]}
G92 E0
G1 E-0.5 F300

; wipe nozzle at park position (X-48.2 brush)
G1 X-28.5 F30000
G1 X-48.2 F3000
G1 X-28.5 F30000 ;wipe and shake
G1 X-48.2 F3000
G1 X-28.5 F30000 ;wipe and shake
G1 X-48.2 F3000

;G392 S0

M400
M106 P1 S0 ; part fan off
;===== filament ready =====

;M400
;M73 P1.717

;===== auto extrude cali start =========================
M975 S1 ; vibration suppression on
;G392 S1

; move to park position for calibration
G90
M83
T1000
G1 X-48.2 Y0 Z10 F10000
M400
M1002 set_filament_type:UNKNOWN

; enable runout and tangle detection
M412 S1 ; filament runout detection on
M400 P10
M620.3 W1 ; filament tangle detection on
M400 S2

M1002 set_filament_type:{filament_type[initial_no_support_extruder]}

;M1002 set_flag extrude_cali_flag=1
; conditional: run dynamic extrusion calibration (M983) if flag set
M1002 judge_flag extrude_cali_flag

M622 J1
    M1002 gcode_claim_action : 8

    ; heat to print temp, prime extruder, start M983 cali
    M109 S{nozzle_temperature[initial_extruder]}
    G1 E10 F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/2.4*60}
    M983 F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/2.4} A0.3 H[nozzle_diameter]; cali dynamic extrusion compensation

    ; fan + wipe while cali data settles
    M106 P1 S255 ; part fan 100%
    M400 S5
    G1 X-28.5 F18000
    G1 X-48.2 F3000
    G1 X-28.5 F18000 ;wipe and shake
    G1 X-48.2 F3000
    G1 X-28.5 F12000 ;wipe and shake
    G1 X-48.2 F3000
    M400
    M106 P1 S0 ; part fan off

    ; retry M983 cali if first attempt failed
    M1002 judge_last_extrude_cali_success
    M622 J0
        M983 F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/2.4} A0.3 H[nozzle_diameter]; cali dynamic extrusion compensation
        M106 P1 S255 ; part fan 100%
        M400 S5
        G1 X-28.5 F18000
        G1 X-48.2 F3000
        G1 X-28.5 F18000 ;wipe and shake
        G1 X-48.2 F3000
        G1 X-28.5 F12000 ;wipe and shake
        M400
        M106 P1 S0 ; part fan off
    M623

    ; M984: measure and store dynamic compensation result
    G1 X-48.2 F3000
    M400
    M984 A0.1 E1 S1 F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/2.4} H[nozzle_diameter]
    M106 P1 S178 ; part fan 70%
    M400 S7
    G1 X-28.5 F18000
    G1 X-48.2 F3000
    G1 X-28.5 F18000 ;wipe and shake
    G1 X-48.2 F3000
    G1 X-28.5 F12000 ;wipe and shake
    G1 X-48.2 F3000
    M400
    M106 P1 S0 ; part fan off
M623 ; end of "draw extrinsic para cali paint"

;G392 S0
;===== auto extrude cali end ========================

;M400
;M73 P1.717

; partial nozzle preheat and fan on before mechanical check
M104 S170 ; preheat nozzle to 170 (below melt point, head start on heating)
M106 S255 ; turn on fan

;===== mech mode fast check start =====================
; vibration/resonance measurement for input shaping
M1002 gcode_claim_action : 3

; Y-axis resonance scan
G1 X128 Y128 F20000
G1 Z5 F1200
M400 P200 ; wait 200ms
M970.3 Q1 A5 K0 O3
M974 Q1 S2 P0

M970.2 Q1 K1 W58 Z0.1
M974 S2

; X-axis resonance scan
G1 X128 Y128 F20000
G1 Z5 F1200
M400 P200 ; wait 200ms
M970.3 Q0 A10 K0 O1
M974 Q0 S2 P0

M970.2 Q0 K1 W78 Z0.1
M974 S2

; re-enable vibration suppression and re-home X after resonance sweep
M975 S1 ; vibration suppression on
G1 F30000
G1 X0 Y5
G28 X ; re-home XY

G1 Z4 F1200

;===== mech mode fast check end =======================

;M400
;M73 P1.717

;===== wipe nozzle =====
M1002 gcode_claim_action : 14

M975 S1 ; vibration suppression on
M106 S128 ; turn on fan at 50% (quieter startup)
; save and disable soft endstops for wipe motion
M211 S; push soft endstop status
M211 X0 Y0 Z0 ; disable soft endstops

;===== remove waste by touching start =====

M104 S170 ; preheat nozzle to 170 (below melt point, head start on heating)

; retract before touching
M83
G1 E-1 F500
G90
M83

; probe nozzle against bed at 2mm steps across X108–X148 to scrape waste
M109 S170
G0 X108 Y-0.5 F30000
G380 S3 Z-5 F1200
G1 Z2 F1200
G1 X110 F10000
G380 S3 Z-5 F1200
G1 Z2 F1200
G1 X112 F10000
G380 S3 Z-5 F1200
G1 Z2 F1200
G1 X114 F10000
G380 S3 Z-5 F1200
G1 Z2 F1200
G1 X116 F10000
G380 S3 Z-5 F1200
G1 Z2 F1200
G1 X118 F10000
G380 S3 Z-5 F1200
G1 Z2 F1200
G1 X120 F10000
G380 S3 Z-5 F1200
G1 Z2 F1200
G1 X122 F10000
G380 S3 Z-5 F1200
G1 Z2 F1200
G1 X124 F10000
G380 S3 Z-5 F1200
G1 Z2 F1200
G1 X126 F10000
G380 S3 Z-5 F1200
G1 Z2 F1200
G1 X128 F10000
G380 S3 Z-5 F1200
G1 Z2 F1200
G1 X130 F10000
G380 S3 Z-5 F1200
G1 Z2 F1200
G1 X132 F10000
G380 S3 Z-5 F1200
G1 Z2 F1200
G1 X134 F10000
G380 S3 Z-5 F1200
G1 Z2 F1200
G1 X136 F10000
G380 S3 Z-5 F1200
G1 Z2 F1200
G1 X138 F10000
G380 S3 Z-5 F1200
G1 Z2 F1200
G1 X140 F10000
G380 S3 Z-5 F1200
G1 Z2 F1200
G1 X142 F10000
G380 S3 Z-5 F1200
G1 Z2 F1200
G1 X144 F10000
G380 S3 Z-5 F1200
G1 Z2 F1200
G1 X146 F10000
G380 S3 Z-5 F1200
G1 Z2 F1200
G1 X148 F10000
G380 S3 Z-5 F1200

G1 Z5 F30000
;===== remove waste by touching end =====

; move to rear of bed, wait for nozzle to cool to print-temp minus 50
G1 Z10 F1200
G0 X118 Y261 F30000
G1 Z5 F1200
M109 S{nozzle_temperature_initial_layer[initial_extruder]-50}

; Z home and disable ABL, then cool nozzle to 140 for steel surface contact
G28 Z P0 T300; home z with low precision,permit 300deg temperature
G29.2 S0 ; ABL off
M104 S140 ; cool nozzle to 140 (safe for bed contact)
G0 Z5 F20000

; nozzle tap on exposed rear steel surface to remove blob (first pass)
G0 X128 Y261 F20000  ; move to exposed steel surface
G0 Z-1.01 F1200      ; stop the nozzle

; circular scrub at steel contact point
G91
G2 I1 J0 X2 Y0 F2000.1
G2 I-0.75 J0 X-1.5
G2 I1 J0 X2
G2 I-0.75 J0 X-1.5
G2 I1 J0 X2
G2 I-0.75 J0 X-1.5
G2 I1 J0 X2
G2 I-0.75 J0 X-1.5
G2 I1 J0 X2
G2 I-0.75 J0 X-1.5
G2 I1 J0 X2
G2 I-0.75 J0 X-1.5
G2 I1 J0 X2
G2 I-0.75 J0 X-1.5
G2 I1 J0 X2
G2 I-0.75 J0 X-1.5
G2 I1 J0 X2
G2 I-0.75 J0 X-1.5
G2 I1 J0 X2
G2 I-0.75 J0 X-1.5

G90
G1 Z10 F1200

;===== brush material wipe nozzle =====

; first brush pass (left zone, X55 approach, Y sweep)
G90
G1 Y250 F30000
G1 X55
G1 Z1.300 F1200
G1 Y262.5 F6000
G91
G1 X-35 F30000
G1 Y-0.5
G1 X45
G1 Y-0.5
G1 X-45
G1 Y-0.5
G1 X45
G1 Y-0.5
G1 X-45
G1 Y-0.5
G1 X45
G1 Z5.000 F1200

; second brush pass (right zone, X30 approach, Y sweep)
G90
G1 X30 Y250.000 F30000
G1 Z1.300 F1200
G1 Y262.5 F6000
G91
G1 X35 F30000
G1 Y-0.5
G1 X-45
G1 Y-0.5
G1 X45
G1 Y-0.5
G1 X-45
G1 Y-0.5
G1 X45
G1 Y-0.5
G1 X-45
G1 Z10.000 F1200

;===== brush material wipe nozzle end =====

; nozzle tap on rear steel surface (second pass after brush wipe)
G90
;G0 X128 Y261 F20000  ; move to exposed steel surface
G1 Y250 F30000
G1 X138
G1 Y261
G0 Z-1.01 F1200      ; stop the nozzle

; circular scrub at steel contact point (post-brush)
G91
G2 I1 J0 X2 Y0 F2000.1
G2 I-0.75 J0 X-1.5
G2 I1 J0 X2
G2 I-0.75 J0 X-1.5
G2 I1 J0 X2
G2 I-0.75 J0 X-1.5
G2 I1 J0 X2
G2 I-0.75 J0 X-1.5
G2 I1 J0 X2
G2 I-0.75 J0 X-1.5
G2 I1 J0 X2
G2 I-0.75 J0 X-1.5
G2 I1 J0 X2
G2 I-0.75 J0 X-1.5
G2 I1 J0 X2
G2 I-0.75 J0 X-1.5
G2 I1 J0 X2
G2 I-0.75 J0 X-1.5
G2 I1 J0 X2
G2 I-0.75 J0 X-1.5

; wait for nozzle at 140, restore soft endstop state
M109 S140
M106 S128 ; turn on fan at 50% (quieter startup)

M211 R; pop softend status

;===== wipe done =====

;M400
;M73 P1.717

;===== bed leveling =====
M1002 judge_flag g29_before_print_flag

; move to origin and enable ABL, wait for bed temp
G90
G1 Z5 F1200
G1 X0 Y0 F30000
G29.2 S1 ; ABL on

M190 S[bed_temperature_initial_layer_single] ; wait for bed temp
M109 S140
M106 S0 ; turn off fan , too noisy

; conditional: run G29 mesh bed leveling and save
M622 J1
    M1002 gcode_claim_action : 1
    G29 A1 X{first_layer_print_min[0]} Y{first_layer_print_min[1]} I{first_layer_print_size[0]} J{first_layer_print_size[1]} ; auto bed level
    M400
    M500 ; save calibration data
M623
;===== bed leveling done =====

;===== home after wipe =====
; conditional: full home if ABL was skipped
M1002 judge_flag g29_before_print_flag
M622 J0

    M1002 gcode_claim_action : 13
    G28

M623

;===== homing done =====

;M400
;M73 P1.717

; move to first-layer start position and set Z offset
G1 X108.000 Y-0.500 F30000
G1 Z0.300 F1200
M400
G2814 Z0.32

M104 S{nozzle_temperature_initial_layer[initial_extruder]} ; prepare to print

;===== purge line =====
;G90
;M83
;G1 Z5 F1200
;G1 X88 Y-0.5 F20000
;G1 Z0.3 F1200

;M109 S{nozzle_temperature_initial_layer[initial_extruder]}

;G1 E2 F300
;G1 X168 E4.989 F6000
;G1 Z1 F1200
;===== nozzle load line end ===========================

;===== extrusion calibration =====

; K-factor (pressure advance) calibration line across front of bed
M400
    M900 S
    M900 C
    G90
    M83

    M109 S{nozzle_temperature_initial_layer[initial_extruder]}
    G0 X128 E8  F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/(24/20)    * 60}
    G0 X133 E.3742  F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/(0.3*0.5)/4     * 60}
    G0 X138 E.3742  F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/(0.3*0.5)     * 60}
    G0 X143 E.3742  F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/(0.3*0.5)/4     * 60}
    G0 X148 E.3742  F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/(0.3*0.5)     * 60}
    G0 X153 E.3742  F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/(0.3*0.5)/4     * 60}
    G91
    G1 X1 Z-0.300
    G1 X4
    G1 Z1 F1200
    G90
    M400

M900 R

; conditional: second cali line at Y1 if extrude_cali_flag set
M1002 judge_flag extrude_cali_flag
M622 J1
    G90
    G1 X108.000 Y1.000 F30000
    G91
    G1 Z-0.700 F1200
    G90
    M83
    G0 X128 E10  F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/(24/20)    * 60}
    G0 X133 E.3742  F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/(0.3*0.5)/4     * 60}
    G0 X138 E.3742  F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/(0.3*0.5)     * 60}
    G0 X143 E.3742  F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/(0.3*0.5)/4     * 60}
    G0 X148 E.3742  F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/(0.3*0.5)     * 60}
    G0 X153 E.3742  F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/(0.3*0.5)/4     * 60}
    G91
    G1 X1 Z-0.300
    G1 X4
    G1 Z1 F1200
    G90
    M400
M623

G1 Z0.2

;M400
;M73 P1.717

;===== wait for print temp =====
M1002 gcode_claim_action : 0
M400

;===== z-offset per plate type =====
;curr_bed_type={curr_bed_type}
{if curr_bed_type=="Textured PEI Plate"}
G29.1 Z{-0.04} ; z-offset -0.04 for textured PEI
{else}
G29.1 Z{-0.02} ; for other plates
{endif}

; lasers and fans off, re-enable vibration suppression before print
M960 S1 P0 ; laser off
M960 S2 P0 ; laser off
M106 S0 ; turn off fan
M106 P2 S0 ; aux fan off
M106 P3 S0 ; chamber fan off

M975 S1 ; vibration suppression on
G90
M83
T1000

; disable soft endstops, enable mass estimation, apply final Z offset
M211 X0 Y0 Z0 ; disable soft endstops
;G392 S1 ; turn on clog detection
M1007 S1 ; mass estimation on
G29.4
change_filament_gcode:
;===== A1 20240913 =======================
; disable mass estimation and clog detection, begin AMS switch
M1007 S0 ; mass estimation off
G392 S0 ; nozzle clog detect off
M620 S[next_extruder]A
M204 S9000
; spiral lift if not first toolchange
{if toolchange_count > 1}
G17
G2 Z{max_layer_z + 0.4} I0.86 J0.86 P1 F10000 ; spiral lift a little from second lift
{endif}
G1 Z{max_layer_z + 3.0} F1200

; fans off, heat old filament for retraction
M400
M106 P1 S0 ; part fan off
M106 P2 S0 ; aux fan off
{if old_filament_temp > 142 && next_extruder < 255}
M104 S[old_filament_temp]
{endif}

; park toolhead at X267 (off-bed right side)
G1 X267 F9000

; conditional long retraction before cut
{if long_retractions_when_cut[previous_extruder]}
M620.11 S1 I[previous_extruder] E-{retraction_distances_when_cut[previous_extruder]} F1200
{else}
M620.11 S0
{endif}
M400

; set AMS feedrate limits for old and new filament, trigger toolchange
M620.1 E F[old_filament_e_feedrate] T{nozzle_temperature_range_high[previous_extruder]}
M620.10 A0 F[old_filament_e_feedrate]
T[next_extruder]
M620.1 E F[new_filament_e_feedrate] T{nozzle_temperature_range_high[next_extruder]}
M620.10 A1 F[new_filament_e_feedrate] L[flush_length] H[nozzle_diameter] T[nozzle_temperature_range_high]

; move Y to mid-bed while AMS loads
G1 Y128 F9000

{if next_extruder < 255}

; restore long retraction if needed, then prime extruder
{if long_retractions_when_cut[previous_extruder]}
M620.11 S1 I[previous_extruder] E{retraction_distances_when_cut[previous_extruder]} F{old_filament_e_feedrate}
M628 S1
G92 E0
G1 E{retraction_distances_when_cut[previous_extruder]} F[old_filament_e_feedrate]
M400
M629 S1
{else}
M620.11 S0
{endif}

M400
G92 E0
M628 S0

{if flush_length_1 > 1}
; FLUSH_START
; always use highest temperature to flush
M400
M1002 set_filament_type:UNKNOWN
M109 S[nozzle_temperature_range_high]
M106 P1 S60 ; part fan 24%
; flush segment 1: pulsatile purge of old filament color
{if flush_length_1 > 23.7}
G1 E23.7 F{old_filament_e_feedrate} ; do not need pulsatile flushing for start part
G1 E{(flush_length_1 - 23.7) * 0.02} F50
G1 E{(flush_length_1 - 23.7) * 0.23} F{old_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E{(flush_length_1 - 23.7) * 0.02} F50
G1 E{(flush_length_1 - 23.7) * 0.23} F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E{(flush_length_1 - 23.7) * 0.02} F50
G1 E{(flush_length_1 - 23.7) * 0.23} F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E{(flush_length_1 - 23.7) * 0.02} F50
G1 E{(flush_length_1 - 23.7) * 0.23} F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
{else}
G1 E{flush_length_1} F{old_filament_e_feedrate}
{endif}
; FLUSH_END
G1 E-[old_retract_length_toolchange] F1800
G1 E[old_retract_length_toolchange] F300
M400
M1002 set_filament_type:{filament_type[next_extruder]}
{endif}

; wipe at park brush (X-48.2) between flush segments 1 and 2
{if flush_length_1 > 45 && flush_length_2 > 1}
; WIPE
M400
M106 P1 S178 ; part fan 70%
M400 S3
G1 X-38.2 F9000
G1 X-48.2 F3000
G1 X-38.2 F9000
G1 X-48.2 F3000
G1 X-38.2 F9000
G1 X-48.2 F3000
M400
M106 P1 S0 ; part fan off
{endif}

{if flush_length_2 > 1}
M106 P1 S60 ; part fan 24%
; FLUSH_START
; flush segment 2: pulsatile purge
G1 E{flush_length_2 * 0.18} F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E{flush_length_2 * 0.02} F50
G1 E{flush_length_2 * 0.18} F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E{flush_length_2 * 0.02} F50
G1 E{flush_length_2 * 0.18} F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E{flush_length_2 * 0.02} F50
G1 E{flush_length_2 * 0.18} F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E{flush_length_2 * 0.02} F50
G1 E{flush_length_2 * 0.18} F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E{flush_length_2 * 0.02} F50
; FLUSH_END
G1 E-[new_retract_length_toolchange] F1800
G1 E[new_retract_length_toolchange] F300
{endif}

; wipe between flush segments 2 and 3
{if flush_length_2 > 45 && flush_length_3 > 1}
; WIPE
M400
M106 P1 S178 ; part fan 70%
M400 S3
G1 X-38.2 F9000
G1 X-48.2 F3000
G1 X-38.2 F9000
G1 X-48.2 F3000
G1 X-38.2 F9000
G1 X-48.2 F3000
M400
M106 P1 S0 ; part fan off
{endif}

{if flush_length_3 > 1}
M106 P1 S60 ; part fan 24%
; FLUSH_START
; flush segment 3: pulsatile purge
G1 E{flush_length_3 * 0.18} F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E{flush_length_3 * 0.02} F50
G1 E{flush_length_3 * 0.18} F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E{flush_length_3 * 0.02} F50
G1 E{flush_length_3 * 0.18} F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E{flush_length_3 * 0.02} F50
G1 E{flush_length_3 * 0.18} F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E{flush_length_3 * 0.02} F50
G1 E{flush_length_3 * 0.18} F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E{flush_length_3 * 0.02} F50
; FLUSH_END
G1 E-[new_retract_length_toolchange] F1800
G1 E[new_retract_length_toolchange] F300
{endif}

; wipe between flush segments 3 and 4
{if flush_length_3 > 45 && flush_length_4 > 1}
; WIPE
M400
M106 P1 S178 ; part fan 70%
M400 S3
G1 X-38.2 F9000
G1 X-48.2 F3000
G1 X-38.2 F9000
G1 X-48.2 F3000
G1 X-38.2 F9000
G1 X-48.2 F3000
M400
M106 P1 S0 ; part fan off
{endif}

{if flush_length_4 > 1}
M106 P1 S60 ; part fan 24%
; FLUSH_START
; flush segment 4: final pulsatile purge
G1 E{flush_length_4 * 0.18} F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E{flush_length_4 * 0.02} F50
G1 E{flush_length_4 * 0.18} F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E{flush_length_4 * 0.02} F50
G1 E{flush_length_4 * 0.18} F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E{flush_length_4 * 0.02} F50
G1 E{flush_length_4 * 0.18} F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E{flush_length_4 * 0.02} F50
G1 E{flush_length_4 * 0.18} F{new_filament_e_feedrate}
G1 E{flush_length_4 * 0.02} F50
; FLUSH_END
{endif}

M629

; wait for new filament temp, compensate for ooze during wait, final wipe
M400
M106 P1 S60 ; part fan 24%
M109 S[new_filament_temp]
G1 E6 F{new_filament_e_feedrate} ;Compensate for filament spillage during waiting temperature
M400
G92 E0
G1 E-[new_retract_length_toolchange] F1800
M400
M106 P1 S178 ; part fan 70%
M400 S3
G1 X-38.2 F9000
G1 X-48.2 F3000
G1 X-38.2 F9000
G1 X-48.2 F3000
G1 X-38.2 F9000
G1 X-48.2 F3000
G1 X-38.2 F9000
G1 X-48.2 F3000
M400
; lift Z, fan off, restore acceleration for layer
G1 Z{max_layer_z + 3.0} F3000
M106 P1 S0 ; part fan off
{if layer_z <= (initial_layer_print_height + 0.001)}
M204 S[initial_layer_acceleration]
{else}
M204 S[default_acceleration]
{endif}
{else}
; no AMS (next_extruder == 255): move directly back to print position
G1 X[x_after_toolchange] Y[y_after_toolchange] Z[z_after_toolchange] F12000
{endif}

; apply dynamic extrusion compensation, conditional cali wipe if flag set
M622.1 S0
M9833 F{outer_wall_volumetric_speed/2.4} A0.3 ; cali dynamic extrusion compensation
M1002 judge_flag filament_need_cali_flag
M622 J1
  G92 E0
  G1 E-[new_retract_length_toolchange] F1800
  M400

  ; extra cali wipe at park brush
  M106 P1 S178 ; part fan 70%
  M400 S4
  G1 X-38.2 F9000
  G1 X-48.2 F3000
  G1 X-38.2 F9000 ;wipe and shake
  G1 X-48.2 F3000
  G1 X-38.2 F12000 ;wipe and shake
  G1 X-48.2 F3000
  M400
  M106 P1 S0 ; part fan off
M623

; complete AMS switch, re-enable clog detection and mass estimation
M621 S[next_extruder]A
G392 S0 ; nozzle clog detect off

M1007 S1 ; mass estimation on
